no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The execute-loop review path already has the pre-close gate in RunPostMergeReview and the targeted TestPreCloseReview suite passes, but the required package-level gate is blocked by unrelated internal/agent tests. `go test -short -race ./internal/agent -count=1 -timeout 120s` fails on existing cancellation/config issues (e.g. `TestWorker_HonorsCancelMidAttempt`, `TestCancelLatency_UnderSLA`, and deprecated model/effort settings), so I could not complete a green commit for this bead without widening scope beyond the review-gate change.
